summary: Tested new comprehensive dashboard stats endpoint and UI. Backend: 29/29 tests passed. Frontend: All dashboard sections display correctly with accurate data.
critical_code_review_comments: Comprehensive stats endpoint correctly aggregates all entity counts
Quantity parsing handles expressions like '10+5' for pending items
All order statuses (pending, confirmed, ready_to_despatch, shipped, delivered, cancelled) properly tracked
Expense calculations show current vs previous month with percentage change
Items stats include most ordered, least ordered, and stale items (no orders in 30+ days)
Support tickets grouped by status (open, in_progress, resolved, closed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard comprehensive stats fully tested. Key stats verified: 22 doctors, 2 medicals, 2 agencies, 47 orders (31 pending), 20 pending items (265 qty), 3 items, 2 support tickets (in_progress). UI displays all sections correctly with gradient header, customer overview cards with lead status breakdown, order status section, pending items with qty-wise breakdown, expenses with month comparison, items statistics with most/least ordered, and support tickets.

sections_verified: orders (by status: pending, confirmed, ready_to_despatch, shipped, delivered, cancelled)
pending_items (total_items, total_quantity, by_item sorted by qty)
items (total, by_main_category, by_subcategory, most_ordered, least_ordered, no_orders_30_days, stale_count)

elements_verified: Hero header with gradient and quick stats
Pending items alert banner (20 items, 265 qty)
Expenses Overview with month comparison (+757.1% change)
Items Statistics with Most Ordered and Stale items
